sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79148" key="parbai/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρ-βαίνω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρ-βασία</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρ-βάτης</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρ-βεβᾰώς</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρ-βολάδην</orth>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παραβ-</foreign>.</entryFree>
